title: pilea gracilis subsp. fujianensis
intro: Pilea gracilis subsp. fujianensis, also known as a subspecies of Pilea gracilis, is a type of flowering plant native to China, particularly in the Fujian province. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pilea gracilis subsp. fujianensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
